title: Sort Commissions With Nulls Last
notes: Recipe 2.5 relies on each engine's default NULL sort position, which is not portable (Postgres/DuckDB/Oracle default NULLS LAST, SQLite/MySQL NULLS FIRST) and MySQL lacks the NULLS LAST keyword. Reference pins NULLs last portably with a CASE flag and adds ename as a tie-breaker among the nulls for determinism.
